description: Style Note The perfect accomplice for your tunic tops or short kurtas, leggings are must-haves in any fashionable wardrobe. Make sure yours is the most fashionable outfit with these trendy three quarter leggings from flying machine.Product Details Red three quarter leggings, has a broad comfortable elasticated waistband Material Care 95% cotton and 5% lycra Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry Do not dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron, do not iron on print Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6'and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
